old_claim.note: Clean Rooms provides a capability that enables this technology without being the only possible path.

new_claim_absent: No direct dependency remains from the broad semiconductors node to clean_rooms; clean rooms belong to chip fabrication and microchip manufacturing, not the broad material/rectifier concept.

source_shape.source_locator: Milestone text describing Braun's 1874 point-contact rectifier in galena, before modern semiconductor clean-room manufacturing.
source_shape.source_claim_summary: The CHM milestone supports an early semiconductor-material and rectifier scope centered on galena point-contact behavior rather than clean-room chip fabrication.
source_shape.source_support_rationale: This rejects the clean-room edge because the source pins the node's earliest scoped claim to pre-clean-room semiconductor behavior; clean rooms remain appropriate on narrower manufacturing nodes such as planar processing and integrated circuits.

ontology_before: The broad Semiconductors node let clean-room manufacturing context flow into every downstream semiconductor-dependent technology.
ontology_after: The Semiconductors node no longer has clean rooms as a prerequisite. Clean rooms remain directly attached to narrower fabrication nodes where contamination control is relevant.
invariant_preserved_or_changed: Changed: clean_rooms no longer reaches every semiconductor dependent through the broad semiconductors node. Preserved: clean_rooms remains connected to silicon_planar_process and integrated_circuits.
would_reject_if: The semiconductors node were narrowed to mean clean-room semiconductor device manufacturing rather than broad materials and early rectifiers.
A source showed that clean rooms are necessary for the 1874 point-contact semiconductor rectifier effect.
The correction removed clean-room dependencies from narrower semiconductor manufacturing nodes where contamination control is still relevant.
short_reason: Clean rooms are semiconductor manufacturing infrastructure, not a prerequisite for the broad semiconductor-materials and early rectifier node.
